” — Martin Geelan Phone 0420 229 066 Location 72/4-6 Park Avenue Waitara, NSW 2077 Hours M-F 7 am - 5 pm Sa 8 am - 4pm Su - RESIDENTIAL PAINTING COMMERCIAL PAINTING INTERIOR PAINTING EXTERIOR PAINTING PB PAINTING&DECORATING’s vision is to exceed customers’ expectations and deliver highest quality results within the scheduled timeframe. Below are some examples of completed projects.

What PB PAINTING&DECORATING offers to it’s customers: free detailed, customised quotations high quality workmanship fully insured, licensed and qualified painter use of premium products attention to detail care taken to protect all interior and exterior surfaces inside and around the building professional preparation clean and tidy work friendly, personalised and flexible service 100% customer satisfaction guarantee (we will turn up on time, treat your property with respect, leaving it clean and tidy, deliver highest quality results within the scheduled timeframe) TESTIMONIALS “Excellent quality of the interior and exterior painting job of our house.

” — Rosemary and Michael Quinn “Pawel from PB Painting was an exceptional tradesman who did an amazing job on my exterior retaining wall and stairs. He was on time, had a professional quote, and was very tidy throughout the job. If you are looking for a high quality painter I would definitely recommend Pawel from PB Painting.

My name is Pawel (Paul) Barszcz, I am the owner of PB Painting&Decorating. I was born and raised in Europe. In 1998 I started working in painting business in Poland, then I moved to Germany and Netherlands, where I gained 10 years of house painting experience. In 2009 I decided to move to Australia, where I started my own painting business based in Sydney. Since then I have been servicing northern suburbs of Sydney.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for PB Painting & Decorating — a Sydney-based company providing professional painting and decorating services including interior painting, exterior painting, residential painting, commercial painting, colour consultation, wallpaper removal, and surface preparation.

Contact: Phone: +61 420 229 066 | Email: pbpainting76@gmail.com | Address: Unit 72/4-6 Park Ave, Waitara NSW 2077, Australia | Website: https://www.pb-painting.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 420 229 066
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to PB Painting & Decorating! How can we help you today?
